description_long: This display features two elaborately dressed dolls standing upright within a white showcase, accompanied by framed artwork and a circular portrait on the back wall. The doll on the left wears a long white dress with intricate lace details, a red sash, and a bonnet, while the doll on the right is dressed in a pale pink gown with ruffles and a matching headpiece. Both dolls have delicate, painted faces and hands, with visible attention to period-appropriate clothing and accessories. The surrounding display includes a small framed picture on the floor and a larger round portrait mounted on the wall, adding to the historical ambiance. The dolls appear to be made primarily of porcelain or ceramic for the head and hands, with fabric clothing and possibly a wire or composite body structure. The overall scene evokes a sense of vintage or antique craftsmanship, suitable for a museum or decorative urban setting.
description: Two antique-style dolls in ornate period clothing are displayed upright in a white showcase, surrounded by framed artwork and a circular portrait. The dolls feature detailed painted faces, lace-trimmed dresses, and bonnets, evoking a vintage, museum-like atmosphere.
description_view_0: Front view showing both dolls in full detail, with their dresses, bonnets, and the surrounding framed artwork clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the side profile of the left doll and the depth of the display case, with partial visibility of the right doll.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the circular portrait and wall art, with the dolls mostly obscured from sight.
description_view_3: Right-angled view showing the back and side of the right doll, with less detail of the left doll and the display's depth.
attribute_clothing_style: The dolls are dressed in Victorian-inspired attire, featuring long, lace-trimmed dresses in white and pale pink, with sashes, ruffles, and bonnets. The garments display intricate patterns and period-appropriate embellishments, evoking 19th-century European fashion.
attribute_pose: Both dolls are standing upright with their arms slightly bent at the elbows and positioned at their sides. Their heads are facing forward, and their legs are straight, giving a static, display-ready posture.
attribute_facial_expression: Both dolls have neutral facial expressions with closed mouths, wide-open painted eyes, and delicately arched eyebrows, conveying a calm and serene demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: The left doll has brown hair styled in a low bun under a bonnet, while the right doll has light blonde hair arranged in soft curls, partially covered by a decorative headpiece.
